zh.lifeSummary: 當Haesgen van Driel於1540年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德普爾圖加阿爾時，她的父親Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel25歲，母親Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven24歲。她於大約1555年與Willem van Essen結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年10月5日在荷蘭-拉藍德享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Haesgen van Driel于1540年出生在荷兰-拉藍德普爾圖加阿爾时，她的父亲Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel25岁，母亲Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven24岁。她于大约1555年与Willem van Essen结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年10月5日在荷兰-拉藍德享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Driel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from a place called Kriele, near Rathenow (Brandenburg). This surname is rare in Germany.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Croyle  .

variants.name: Creel
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kriel or Krüll, a variant of Kroll 1.

variants.name: Croyle
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Criel-sur-Mer, in Seine-Maritime, France.

historicEvents.description: William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
The Dutch declared their independence from Spain.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."

en.lifeSummary: When Haesgen van Driel was born in 1540, in Poortugaal, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel, was 25 and her mother, Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven, was 24. She married Willem van Essen about 1555. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 5 October 1615, in South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Haesgen van Driel est née en 1540, à Poortugaal, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Willem van Essen environ 1555. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 octobre 1615, à Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Haesgen van Driel 1540 in Poortugaal, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel 25 und ihre Mutter Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven 24. Sie hat um 1555 Willem van Essen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Oktober 1615 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Haesgen van Driel è nata il nel 1540 nel Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Willem van Essen circa 1555. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 5 ottobre 1615, nel Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Haesgen van Drielが1540年にオランダズイド-hオランドポオルトゥガアルで生まれた時，父Jan Cornelisz Doens van Drielは25歳，母Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirvenは24歳であった。約1555年にWillem van Essenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年10月5日にオランダズイド-hオランドで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Haesgen van Driel(이)가 1540년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 포어투가앨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1555년 Willem van Essen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 10월 5일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Haesgen van Driel nasceu em 1540, em Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Willem van Essen aproximadamente 1555. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1615, em Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 75 anos.

ro.Zijpe: Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zeeland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Haesgen van Driel родилась в 1540 г. в местности пуртугааль, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Willem van Essen около 1555 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 октября 1615 г. в местности зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Haesgen van Driel nació en 1540, en Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Willem van Essen aproximadamente 1555. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1615, en Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 75 años.
